CustomField.formula: IF(ISPICKVAL(Status, "Closed"), IF(( ClosedDate -Close_Date_Time_Objective__c)* 24 <= 0,"Accord Niveau de Service",IF(AND((ClosedDate -Close_Date_Time_Objective__c) * 24 > 0,(ClosedDate -Close_Date_Time_Objective__c) * 24 <=48),"Hors délais 48H","Alerte Niveau de Service")), IF((NOW()-Close_Date_Time_Objective__c)* 24 <= 0,"Accord Niveau de Service",IF(AND((NOW()-Close_Date_Time_Objective__c) * 24 > 0,(NOW()-Close_Date_Time_Objective__c) * 24 <=48),"Hors délais 48H","Alerte Niveau de Service")))
CustomField.label: Overdue_fr
